canonical_name: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
aliases: Forces Révolutionnaires de la Famille G9 et Alliés
Fòs Revolisyonè G9 an Fanmi e Alye
description: A federation of 12 armed groups in Haiti led by former police officer Jimmy 'Barbecue' Chérizier, founded in June 2020. It controls over 80% of Port-au-Prince and is involved in extrajudicial massacres, drug trafficking, and political violence. In March 2024, it participated in a jailbreak that led to the resignation of Prime Minister Ariel Henry.

country_links.evidence_quote: They have access to a variety of illegal weapons, mostly from the United States, giving them more firepower than the police.
country_links.context: The G9 sources illegal weapons from the United States.
